name: LiquidGlassKit
desc: Backport of Apple’s Liquid Glass system for iOS 13–18 with native API parity. Includes a reimplementation for iOS 26+ that unlocks advanced customization beyon…
descFull: Backport of Apple’s Liquid Glass system for iOS 13–18 with native API parity. Includes a reimplementation for iOS 26+ that unlocks advanced customization beyond the native system's limits.
